caption: A video clip captures a simulated American football game. In the first scene, a player in a white jersey numbered "24" runs with the ball toward the goal line, pursued by a player in black. On-screen text indicates "1st & 10", "14", "7", and "4th 3:54 :20". As the action progresses, the player in white is tackled by several defenders in black jerseys. A picture-in-picture overlay appears, showing a blonde man in a black shirt reacting to the play. The game state updates to "1st & Goal", "14", "7", and "4th 3:54 1:30", with additional text reading "N. CHUBB 8 RUSHES, 57 YDS, 1 TD". The man in the overlay is seen with his hand to his face. The final scene transitions abruptly to a bright, abstract yellow and orange glowing visual, completely obscuring the football field and the players.
